steps.title: Use the practical consequence
steps.content: The passage defines horizontal gene transfer, notes that it can increase antibiotic resistance, and then says understanding how to prevent it might help mitigate dangerous pathogens.

steps.title: State the main idea
steps.content: A mentions a mistaken perception, B claims a changed view of frequency, and C refers to new research overturning earlier findings. The main idea is the possible practical value of studying the process. The answer is D.
